source_pr.title: executor, planner: refine merge join compare methods to avoid some rare cases
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

fix merge join incorrect result in some rare cases.

### What is changed and how it works?

change the compare method

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change

Related changes

 - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

symptoms: tk.MustQuery(`select t1.a, t2.a from t1 join t2 on t1.a=t2.a order by t1.a;`).Check(testkit.Rows( (executor/merge_join_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery(`select t1.a, t2.a from t1 join t2 on t1.a=t2.a order by t1.a;`).Check(testkit.Rows( (executor/merge_join_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery(`select t1.a, t2.a from t1 join t2 on t1.a=t2.a order by t1.a;`).Check(testkit.Rows( (executor/merge_join_test.go)
